calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Anna Dubrovsky, Esq. for Petitioner: Aleksandr Davidovich, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Irina Davidovich, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $100,000.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $25,000.00
Costs $1,800.00
Medical expenses $2,876.00
A net balance of $70,324.00 to purchase annuity with Pacific Life & Annuity Services, IPD 3rd Flr., 700 Newport Center Dr., Newport Beach, CA. 92660.
Counsel to prepare Order on mandatory Judicial Council form.

Sept. 7, 2004
Order approving compromised of claim of a Minor rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
